task_description: Add multiple event handling to the Flight Card Scanner. Split app config from event config. Discover events from config.json files in the events directory tree. Serve each event under /events/{path}/ prefix. Add events listing page, lazy event loading with idle timeout, admin refresh button, nav updates, and descriptive page titles.

verification.summary: 401 tests pass (including 74 new tests across test_config_split.py, test_event_manager.py, and test_multi_event_routing.py). 2 pre-existing flaky test failures in unmodified files (test_audit_service.py, test_property_email_identity.py). Docker build skipped due to network constraints.

issues_fixed: SSL null crash: changed 'if key in data' to 'if data.get(key) is not None' in load_app_config() and load_config()
Concurrency guard: added asyncio.Lock to EventManager protecting open/close/get/idle-check/shutdown
Empty-slug edge case: root-level config.json files are now skipped with a warning log
issues_not_applicable: Legacy router dead code: old routers are not included in app (checked main.py), dead code cannot be reached
QR URL string replacement: lower priority, not fixed in this pass
